message:
deps: bump asupersync from 0.3.0 to 0.3.1

Bumps asupersync across both crates that depend on it:

- crates/fnp-runtime/Cargo.toml: asupersync 0.3.0 -> 0.3.1
  (feature-gated via the `asupersync` feature, default-features = false,
  optional = true). Runtime integration is off by default.
- crates/fnp-conformance/Cargo.toml: asupersync 0.3.0 -> 0.3.1
  (direct dependency, used by the conformance harness).

Cargo.lock refreshed via `cargo update -p asupersync`, which also pulled
matching 0.3.1 releases of the companion crates in the asupersync family:

- asupersync-macros 0.3.0 -> 0.3.1
- franken-decision  0.3.0 -> 0.3.1
- franken-evidence  0.3.0 -> 0.3.1
- franken-kernel    0.3.0 -> 0.3.1

asupersync 0.3.1 was published to crates.io on 2026-04-21 (~3h ago) and is
the latest stable. This is a patch release in the 0.3.x line; no API surface
changes were needed to adopt it.

Verified with:
  rch exec -- cargo check -p fnp-runtime --features asupersync --all-targets
  rch exec -- cargo check -p fnp-conformance --all-targets

Both pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
